methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Biotech & Health (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 14 same-sector peers exist in Biotech & Health, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 6.1x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

data.narrative:
Isomorphic Labs is a private-stage biotech company founded by Demis Hassabis that has raised $600M to date. The valuation universe comprises 3 public comparables (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers in Biotech & Health, including Abridge, Ultima Genomics, Eikon Therapeutics, Xaira Therapeutics, and Freenome.

Two standard triangulation methods were evaluated. Peer-median analysis proved inapplicable: while 14 same-sector peers exist in Biotech & Health, zero met narrow stage, adjacency, or valuation-tier filters required for statistical confidence. Public-comp anchoring was also inapplicable because the target's revenue is not on file—a common constraint for private companies. Public Biotech & Health comparables trade at a median P/S of 6.1x across three tickers, but without disclosed revenue, this multiple cannot be applied.

The analysis cannot support a specific valuation range given the lack of disclosed metrics and insufficient narrow-set peer density. Key uncertainties center on revenue and profitability status, clinical-stage progress, and which private peer cohort (if any) represents true stage and risk parity. A credible valuation would require either target revenue disclosure or reliance on the private peer set through other methods not applicable here (e.g., precedent transaction multiples if M&A data exists). Further data collection is necessary before triangulation.
